settings.lang.heading: Language
settings.signing.heading: Signing key
settings.signing.fingerprint: Your signing key (used to prove your captures haven't been changed): {fp}
settings.update.heading: Updates
settings.extension.heading: Browser extension
settings.extension.subtitle: Pair the Capsule extension to send links and cookies straight from your browser.
settings.extension.pair_prompt: Give this extension a label so you can recognise it later.
settings.extension.token_caption: Copy this token into the extension. It is shown only once.
settings.extension.revoke_confirm: Revoke this extension? It will stop being able to submit captures.
settings.extension.install.intro: The Capsule extension isn't in a browser store yet, so you load it directly from this app. About two minutes:
settings.extension.install.step1.title: 1. Download the extension
settings.extension.install.step1.body: Save the .zip below and unzip it somewhere you'll remember (Documents is fine).
settings.extension.install.step2.title: 2. Open your browser's extensions page
settings.extension.install.step2.chrome: Chrome / Edge / Brave: open chrome://extensions and turn on Developer mode (top right).
settings.extension.install.step3.title: 3. Load the unpacked extension
settings.extension.install.step3.chrome: Chrome / Edge / Brave: click "Load unpacked" and pick the unzipped extension folder.
settings.extension.install.step3.firefox: Firefox: click "Load Temporary Add-on…" and pick manifest.json inside the unzipped folder. Firefox clears temporary add-ons on restart — re-load to keep using.
settings.extension.install.step4.title: 4. Pair the extension with Capsule
settings.extension.install.step4.intro: Same flow for Chrome / Edge / Brave AND Firefox — the token only ever lives between this Settings page and your browser:
settings.extension.install.step4.a: On this page, click the "Pair a new extension" button above. Give it a label like "My laptop" and click OK. Capsule will show you a token in a green box.
settings.extension.install.step4.b: Click "Copy token" while that green box is visible — the token is shown only once. If you close the box without copying, click "Pair a new extension" again to get a new one.
settings.extension.install.step4.c: Find the Capsule extension's icon in your browser toolbar (top-right corner). In Chrome / Edge / Brave you may need to click the puzzle-piece icon and pin Capsule first.
settings.extension.install.step4.d: Click that icon. The popup says it isn't paired yet — click "Pair with Capsule". A new tab opens with a pairing form.
settings.extension.install.step4.e: Fill in the form: Server URL = http://localhost:8080 (leave as-is), Token = paste the one you copied, Label = anything memorable.
settings.extension.install.step4.f: Click "Pair". A green message appears: "Paired with http://localhost:8080…". You can close that tab.
settings.extension.install.step4.g: Click the extension icon again. You'll now see the case picker and the "Send this tab" / "Send a list of URLs" / "Sync cookies" buttons.
settings.extension.install.troubleshoot: If the extension says "Server identity changed", re-pair from this page. If you suspect a token leak, click Revoke next to the paired entry below.
settings.extension.implications: The extension uses your live browser session — including HttpOnly cookies — so captures inherit your authenticated state. Live capture is optional.
pdf.brand.name: Capsule

errors.duplicate: This URL is already captured in this case.
duplicate.modal.title: Already captured
duplicate.modal.body: We found this URL in your library — captured {when}.
duplicate.batch.summary.new: {count, plural, =0 {No new captures} one {# new capture} other {# new captures}}
duplicate.batch.summary.dup: {count, plural, one {# already in this case} other {# already in this case}}
duplicate.batch.summary.ib: {count, plural, one {# repeated in paste} other {# repeated in paste}}
recent.clear.button.aria: Permanently delete every capture in this case
recent.clear.dialog.title: {count, plural, one {Permanently delete # capture?} other {Permanently delete # captures?}}
recent.clear.dialog.body: This deletes all captured files for {case_name}: media, page snapshots, screenshots, WARCs, signatures, and reports. About {freed_bytes} will be freed. Cookies and your signing key are not affected.
recent.clear.dialog.audit_note: The audit log keeps a record of what was deleted, so chain-of-custody is preserved.
recent.clear.snackbar: {count, plural, one {# capture cleared} other {# captures cleared}} · {freed_bytes} freed
recent.clear.error: Couldn't clear the list. Try again.
download.options.output.heading: Output
download.options.audio_only.label: Audio only
download.options.audio_only.aria: Download audio only — extract the audio stream and skip the video
download.options.quality.label: Quality
download.options.format.label: Format
download.options.format.aria.video: Video container — only changes the muxer, never the codec
download.options.format.aria.audio: Audio container — picks the on-disk audio file format
download.options.subs.label: Subtitles
download.action.restart.aria: Wipe partial bytes and start this capture over
download.action.cancel.confirm.title: Cancel this capture?
download.action.cancel.confirm.body: The download will stop and any partial files will be discarded. The page snapshot, if it already saved, will not be deleted.
download.action.restart.confirm.title: Restart from scratch?
download.action.restart.confirm.body: Any partially downloaded bytes will be deleted and the capture will start over. Use this when the partial download seems corrupted, or when you want forensically clean bytes.
download.stalled.chip: {seconds, plural, one {Stalled — no progress for # second} other {Stalled — no progress for # seconds}}
download.stalled.aria: This capture has not made progress recently
pdf.report.field.download_options.audio_: Audio extracted only — page snapshot preserves the original video.
pdf.report.field.download_options.restar: {count, plural, one {# manual restart} other {# manual restarts}}
pdf.report.field.download_options.stalle: {count, plural, one {# stall event} other {# stall events}}
